title: Nola Turns the Battle Chaotic
description: Zoro pushes through the Upper Yard battlefield as Shandia warriors and Enel’s agents continue to fall one by one.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this scene centers on Luffy, Wyper, Nico Robin, Enel, Zoro. Zoro pushes through the Upper Yard battlefield as Shandia warriors and Enel’s agents continue to fall one by one.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: You, forgiving me...? That's preposte- Rous...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: You really want to protect those ruins...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: But those ruins aren't even yours...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Is that all? Charging like a bull...?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: are upside down... wait!! My dials!!

summary: Zoro pushes through the Upper Yard battlefield as Shandia warriors and Enel’s agents continue to fall one by one.
